EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads at the third attempt stage when the quote was for the FUL scheme.
EmailTemplate.name: Opportunity (FUL) – 3rd Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Did you miss something off your quote?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for getting an insurance quote from Kingsbridge.
Now you’ve reviewing your quotation documents, is there anything you missed?
Here are the types of coverage you can add to your policy:
- Cyber Liability - Covers your business from risks related to your technology and IT infrastructure. - IR35 Protect - Protects limited company contractors from the potentially crippling costs that can follow an IR35 enquiry. - Legal Expenses - Protects your business in the event of legal action.
If you need to make a change to your quote, reply with the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively, you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
